Page 1 — Clean Page 2 — All Templates Page 3 — Chosen Approved templates only — these are wired to the pipeline

Chosen Ones

Oak Park AI Hub · approved + locked · one per series · pipeline-ready

ROW 1 — Full Carousel Formats
OPC — Oak Park Construction
#0A0A0A
Obsidian
#CBCC10
Lime
#9A9B0C
Lime Dark BG
#F0EBE3
Cream
#FFFFFF
White
#CC1F2D
Alert Red
#6B7280
Mid Gray
TIP OF THE WEEK
FORMAT10_01 · OPC · LEGACY · Tip of the Week
OPC · full carousel format · 5 slides
Weekly educational post. One construction or renovation concept — stat on slide 2, step-by-step list on slide 3, product/material callout on slide 4, CTA on slide 5. No named person required. Use arrows to navigate all 5 slides. 3 color variants.
slide 1 / 5
News — Brazil · Full Formats
#0D0B08
Ink
#C9A84C
Gold
#E8CC7A
Gold Light
#F5EDD6
Cream
#8B1A1A
Alert Red
#FFFFFF
White
Brazil — QUEM DECIDIU ISSO?
FORMAT02_00 · BR · LEGACY · Quem Decidiu Isso?
Brazil News · political breakdown · 6 slides
Brazil political breakdown carousel. 'Who actually decided this?' — traces a law, tariff, or policy back to the person who voted/approved it. Uses native Brazil dark + Canário gold brand. Cover, 4 breakdown slides, Sources. PT-BR. Navigate all 6 slides with arrows.
slide 1 / 6
Brazil — WHO IS THIS PERSON?
FORMAT20_00 · BR · LEGACY · Who Is This Person?
Brazil News · biographical carousel · 7 slides
FORMAT-020 full 7-slide carousel. Cover (video frame), Biography fact grid (6 bilingual fields + controversy pills), Network hub-and-spoke (8 nodes at 45°), 3 Reel slides, Sources. InBr canário gold (#C9A84C). Playfair + Cormorant Garamond + Space Mono. PT-BR. Navigate all 7 slides with arrows.
slide 1 / 7
Brazil — VERIFICAMOS
FORMAT13_00 · BR · SHARED · Verificamos / Fact-Check
Brazil News · fact-check carousel · 5 slides
Shared fact-check template used by Verificamos, Verdade Pela Metade, and any debunk series. Cover with sticker-slot for main subject (person face mandatory), 3 breakdown slides (claim → data → verdict), Sources/CTA. Obsidian bg + Canário gold (#C9A84C). Cover headline max 56% width — person portrait floats right. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 5

#FFFFFF

USA — WHO IS THIS PERSON?
FORMAT20_00 · US · LEGACY · Who Is This Person?
USA News · biographical carousel · 7 slides
FORMAT-020 full 7-slide carousel (USA mirror). Cover (video frame), Biography fact grid (6 fields in English + controversy pills), Network hub-and-spoke (8 nodes at 45°), 3 Reel slides, Sources. InUS signal red (#CC1F2D) + navy (#0D3A6B). Playfair + Cormorant Garamond + Space Mono. EN. Navigate all 7 slides with arrows.
slide 1 / 7
USA — WHO DECIDED THIS?
FORMAT02_00 · US · LEGACY · Who Decided This?
USA News · political breakdown · 6 slides
USA color-adapted FORMAT-002 carousel. 'Who actually decided this?' — traces a policy, case, or vote back to the person who made the call. Obsidian bg + signal red (#CC1F2D). Cover, Timeline, Network, Data, Profile, Sources. EN. Navigate all 6 slides with arrows.
slide 1 / 6
USA — THE CHAIN
FORMAT_USA · US · SHARED · The Chain / Fact-Checked
USA News · explainer carousel · 5 slides
Shared fact-check/explainer template for The Chain and Fact-Checked USA series. Cover with sticker-slot for main subject (person face mandatory), 3 breakdown slides, Sources/CTA. Obsidian bg + signal red (#C84040). Cover headline max 56% width — portrait floats right. Mirror of Brazil shared format, EN. Bilingual tag line on each slide.
slide 1 / 5
ROW 2 — Standalone Slides · Mix & Match into Any Carousel
OPC — Oak Park Construction · Standalone Slides
OPC — Statement · Mid-Carousel
FORMATOPC_01 · OPC · LEGACY · Statement
OPC · body slide · quote or testimonial
Mid-carousel quote slide for any OPC story — Mike-from-the-field, homeowner testimonial, inspector citation, code reference. Quote opener (bold italic Barlow) + body (Roboto Condensed) + attribution on obsidian left zone. Person photo right with B&W grayscale + diagonal divider + lime accent edge. OPC stacked logo bottom-left with CBC1263425 license. Mirror of Brazil/USA Statement layout adapted to OPC brand. EN.
slide 1 / 1
OPC — Material / Product Profile
FORMATOPC_03 · OPC · LEGACY · Material / Service / Technique
OPC · standalone · product, material, service, design style, or technique info slide
OPC adaptation of the biography/fact-grid slide. Not person-based. Use for a product, material, finish, construction technique, design style, or service category. Grid fields: Best For, Not Ideal For, Durability, Install Notes, Cost Range, Style Fit. Bottom pills show decision factors like Moisture, Maintenance, Lead Time, Warranty, Resale. EN.
slide 1 / 1
OPC — Item Spotlight
FORMATOPC_07 · OPC · LEGACY · Product / Material / Style Spotlight
OPC · standalone · one product, material, finish, style, service detail, or technique
OPC adaptation of the profile/info slide. Use for one specific item: product, material, finish, design style, service detail, or construction technique. Not best for showing project progress because the photo is intentionally small; the slide is mostly explanation. Slots: background mood image, small item thumbnail, category strip, item name, four explainers: best use case, why OPC would suggest it, where it can fail, what to compare. EN.
slide 1 / 1
OPC — 4-Card Project / Product Grid
FORMATOPC_06 · OPC · LEGACY · Project / Product Comparison Grid
OPC · standalone · project photos, product picks, material shortlist, design choices
OPC adaptation of the 4-stat breakdown grid. Two standalone modes in one file: slide 1 uses four project photos/details; slide 2 uses four product/material recommendation cards, like tile, stone, wood, and hardware. Each rectangle has its own photo slot plus title, short description, and category badge. Use when a topic needs four visible options, project decisions, product recommendations, or material comparisons. EN.
slide 1 / 2
OPC — Progress Media Story
FORMATOPC_05 · OPC · LEGACY · Progress Photo / Video
OPC · standalone · reusable cover or mid-slide for progress photos/videos
OPC adaptation of the FORMAT-020 video-frame slide. Not person-based. Use for progress videos, before/during/after photos, jobsite proof, inspection moments, installation stages, or quick field updates. Larger lower description area explains what is happening, why it matters, what changed, and what comes next. Can be used once as a cover or repeated multiple times as mid-carousel evidence slides. EN.
slide 1 / 1
OPC — Duotone Statement
FORMATOPC_04 · OPC · LEGACY · Duotone Statement
OPC · standalone · statement cover
3 DUOTONE VARIANTS to compare (use ← →): V1 navy→soft lime, V2 navy→muted yellow-green, V3 deep teal→soft lime. Olive #9A9B0C bg constant. Photo now has darker shadows and a quieter lime overlay so it separates from the background. Bold Playfair headline + duotone photo + client quote + OPC attribution. EN.
slide 1 / 3
OPC — Cover · Base 1
FORMATOPC_02 · OPC · LEGACY · Base Cover
OPC · cover slide · bg photo + sticker portrait
Full-bleed kitchen/project bg photo (grayscale + dark overlay + halftone) + OPC lime corner brackets + sticker portrait card top-right (B&W, lime border) + lime stamp badge overlapping sticker + italic-accent headline left (Anton + Barlow italic) + person pill bottom-left + swipe CTA bottom-right. Pipeline slots: bg, sticker, stamp-text, tag, headline, hook, byline, cta. Use as cover for any OPC Tip or standalone post. Mike photo in sticker = OPC face. EN.
slide 1 / 1
OPC — Progress Update · Before & After
FORMATOPC_05 · OPC · Progress / Before-After
OPC · full carousel · 5-slide progress + 1 before/after reveal
Project progress series — 5 slides (Cover, Stage, Done, Next, Credits) + 1 split-panel Before & After slide. Use for ongoing renovation updates OR final before/after reveals. Before slot = grayscale (CSS), After slot = full color. Jobsite bg photo + optional Mike sticker. Slides 16–18 = before/after for each variant. 3 color variants. EN.
slide 1 / 18
OPC — Illustrated Tip
FORMATOPC_06 · OPC · Illustrated Tip
OPC · full carousel · 5 slides · educational tip with image panel
Educational carousel with a mid-slide illustration panel (.ill-panel) for a product shot, material sample, or detail photo. 5 slides: Cover (bg photo + sticker) → Stat → List (bullet steps) → Tip callout → Sources. Good for Product Tips and technique explanations where one image anchors the concept. 3 color variants. EN.
slide 1 / 15
OPC — Cutout
FORMATOPC_07 · OPC · Cutout
OPC · full carousel · 5 slides · cutout photo emphasis
Same 5-slide structure as Illustrated Tip (Cover → Stat → List → Tip → Sources) but the visual layer uses a cutout/die-cut photo treatment (.cutout-wrap + .cutout-img with drop-shadow) instead of a rectangular panel. Good when the person or product silhouette should "float" without a box frame. Mike cutout photo is the default sticker. 3 color variants. EN.
slide 1 / 15
News — Brazil · Standalone Slides
Brazil — Base 1
FORMATBR_01 · BR · LEGACY · Base Cover
Brazil News · standalone · base · all series
Approved base slide for ALL Brazil news stories. Dark background + canário gold (#C9A84C). Corner brackets 64px safe margin, Playfair serif headline with italic gold accent word, portrait sticker card top-right (310×410px), person attribution pill bottom-left. Pipeline: inject .bg-photo + .sticker-slot.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Statement · Mid-Carousel
FORMATBR_02 · BR · LEGACY · Statement
Brazil News · body slide · quote or analysis
Mid-carousel quote slide. Quote opener (bold italic) + body text + attribution on black left zone. Person photo right with red duotone + diagonal divider. InBr logo bottom-left. Use for any slide quoting a named person. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Biography · Quem é?
FORMAT20_01 · BR · LEGACY · Biography
Brazil News · standalone · biographical info slide
Dark background. Large Playfair "Quem é / [name]?" (italic gold), divider diamond rule, 2-col fact grid: NASCIMENTO·BORN, BACKGROUND, VIRADA·TURNING POINT, MISSÃO·MISSION, PLATAFORMA, ESTILO·STYLE — all 24px Roboto Condensed for IG readability. Bottom: tópicos polêmicos pills. InBr gold (#C9A84C). FORMAT-020 slide 1.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Network · Conexões
FORMAT02_04 · BR · ACTIVE · Network / Connections
Brazil News · standalone · network diagram slide
Hub-and-spoke connection map. "REDE & CONEXÕES" + Playfair "Pessoas Poderosas & Famosas". 840×840 diagram: center node (130px circle) + 8 satellites (100px circles) at 45° intervals, dashed gold SVG lines with arrowheads. Pipeline injects initials + names into each node. InBr gold (#C9A84C). FORMAT-020 slide 3.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Cover · Main Character
FORMATBR_03 · BR · LEGACY · Main Character Cover
Brazil News · standalone cover · named person
Split-screen dark cover. Black left zone (InBr logo + bold condensed headline). Right zone: person photo with red duotone + torn paper left edge. CSS handles grayscale+duotone — pipeline drops photo, never touches filters. Not yet approved — split-screen layout under review. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Single Character + Object Cover
FORMAT02_02 · BR · ACTIVE · Single Character + Object
Brazil News · cover · 1 character w/ environmental object
Canário gold bg + navy flag-blob bottom (echoes Brazilian flag composition). Single B&W cutout subject on the left (full-height bleed, including any object they hold like a Constitution or document). Bold black uppercase headline right side. Use when story centers on ONE character with a meaningful object/setting. PRODUCTION: rembg cutout includes both subject + object together. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 3
Brazil — Two Character Face-Off
FORMAT02_03 · BR · ACTIVE · Face-Off
Brazil News · cover · 2 characters in dispute
Full-bleed contextual background (place / scene / building) with sepia duotone. Single chosen cover: two huge cropped faces on left + right, with the headline separating both people. Center cream serif headline. Cream bottom strip with italic subhead. InBr badges + topic stamp. Use when story is about a DISPUTE / OPPOSITION / DEBATE between two named figures. PRODUCTION: rembg on profile-view photos + face detection to normalize subject sizes + transparent headroom so hair/head is never clipped. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Two Character Cover
FORMAT02_01 · BR · ACTIVE · Two Character
Brazil News · cover · 2 main characters
Brick red bg (#A52929) + mint headline (#D6E8AC) wrapping around a SOLID BLACK photo block holding two cut-out characters in duotone (obsidian → sage). Use whenever a story has TWO main characters. 200 reais paper texture in corners, "1/10" counter pill top-right, dark CTA pill bottom-right, InBr logo bottom-left. Inline black pill for joining words ("de"). PRODUCTION pipeline: cut out each subject via remove.bg → composite side-by-side as transparent PNG → drop into .bg-placeholder. Heads peek above the top edge of the block. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 1
Brazil — Duotone Statement
FORMATBR_04 · BR · LEGACY · Duotone Statement
Brazil News · standalone · statement cover
3 DUOTONE VARIANTS to compare (use ← →): V1 navy→gold (current), V2 black→cream (Folha/newspaper), V3 obsidian→sage from Two Character Cover. Gold #C9A84C bg constant across all 3. Bold Playfair headline + large duotone photo + pull quote + InBr attribution bar. PT-BR.
slide 1 / 3

USA — Base 1
FORMATUS_01 · US · LEGACY · Base Cover
USA News · standalone · base · all series
Approved base slide for ALL USA news stories. Same design language as Brazil Base 1. Signal red (#CC1F2D) replaces canário gold everywhere — corners, sticker frame, accent word, person pill border. Dark background + parchment text. Pipeline: inject .bg-photo + .sticker-slot.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Cover · Main Character
FORMATUS_02 · US · LEGACY · Main Character Cover
USA News · standalone cover · named person
Split-screen dark cover. Black left zone (InUS logo + bold condensed headline). Right zone: person photo with blue duotone + torn paper edge. Mirror of Brazil Cover. Not yet approved — split-screen layout under review. EN.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Statement · Mid-Carousel
FORMATUS_03 · US · LEGACY · Statement
USA News · body slide · quote or analysis
Mid-carousel quote slide. Quote opener (bold italic) + body text + attribution on black left zone. Person photo right with blue duotone + diagonal divider. InUS logo bottom-left. Mirror of Brazil Statement. EN.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Biography · Who Is?
FORMAT20_01 · US · LEGACY · Biography
USA News · standalone · biographical info slide
Dark background. Large Playfair "Who is / [name]?" (italic red), divider diamond rule, 2-col fact grid: BORN, BACKGROUND, TURNING POINT, MISSION, PLATFORM, STYLE — all 24px Roboto Condensed for IG readability. Bottom: key controversies pills. InUS signal red (#CC1F2D). FORMAT-020 slide 1.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Network · Connections
FORMAT02_04 · US · ACTIVE · Network / Connections
USA News · standalone · network diagram slide
Hub-and-spoke connection map. "NETWORK & CONNECTIONS" + Playfair "Powerful People & Ties". 840×840 diagram: center node (130px) + 8 satellites (100px) at 45°, dashed red SVG lines with arrowheads. Pipeline injects initials + names. InUS signal red (#CC1F2D). FORMAT-020 slide 3.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Two Character Cover
FORMAT02_01 · US · ACTIVE · Two Character
USA News · cover · 2 main characters
Navy bg (#0D1B3E) + cream headline (#F0EBE3) wrapping a solid black photo block holding two cutout subjects. Heads extend ABOVE the block top edge — block frames torsos. Treasury/dollar paper texture corners. Same rembg cutout pipeline as Brazil version. EN.
slide 1 / 1
USA — Single Character + Object Cover
FORMAT02_02 · US · ACTIVE · Single Character + Object
USA News · cover · 1 character w/ environmental object
Crimson bg (#8B1A1A) + navy flag-blob bottom. Single B&W cutout subject left + bold cream uppercase headline right. Use when story centers on ONE character with a meaningful object. PRODUCTION: rembg cutout includes subject + object together. EN.
slide 1 / 3
USA — Two Character Face-Off
FORMAT02_03 · US · ACTIVE · Face-Off
USA News · cover · 2 characters in dispute
Full-bleed contextual bg with steel-blue duotone. Two profile cutouts facing each other + center cream serif headline + cream bottom strip subhead. V3 uses huge cropped faces with the headline separating both people. Use for DEBATE / OPPOSITION stories. PRODUCTION: rembg on profile photos + face detection size normalization. EN.
slide 1 / 3
USA — Duotone Statement
FORMATUS_04 · US · LEGACY · Duotone Statement
USA News · standalone · statement cover
3 DUOTONE VARIANTS to compare (use ← →): V1 navy→cream (current), V2 black→cream (more dramatic), V3 black→pale yellow (warning poster). Crimson #8B1A1A bg + navy 8px top bar constant. Bold Playfair headline + duotone photo + pull quote + InUS attribution. EN.
slide 1 / 3
